# CodesByHarish — Harish N

> Full-Stack PHP Developer & Backend Engineer based in Bengaluru, India.
> Portfolio: https://codesbyharish.in

## About

Harish N is a Software Developer specializing in secure PHP web application development, REST API engineering, and MySQL database-driven systems. He is currently a Software Developer at SolarBee (Nov 2024–Present) and pursuing an MCA in Cyber Security at Jain University, Bengaluru (2025–2027). He holds a BCA from BITS Hi-Tech College (Davangere University) with a CGPA of 8.41.

## Core Skills

- **Backend**: PHP, MySQL, MariaDB, REST APIs, Laravel (learning), MVC architecture
- **Frontend**: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Bootstrap, Fetch API
- **Security**: OWASP Top 10, CSRF, SQL injection prevention, XSS filtering, JWT auth
- **Tools**: Git, GitHub, PhpMyAdmin, cPanel, Linux Terminal
- **Other**: Python, Firebase, Docker (basics), Google Analytics, SEO

## Services

- PHP Web Application Development (₹15,000–₹80,000)
- REST API Development (₹10,000–₹50,000)
- Database Design & Optimization (₹5,000–₹25,000)
- E-Commerce Platform Development with Razorpay/Delhivery (₹25,000–₹1,20,000)
- Web Security Review / OWASP Audit (₹8,000–₹35,000)
- Technical SEO & Analytics (₹6,000–₹30,000)

## Projects

- **EliteArtsss Jewelry E-Commerce** — Razorpay + Delhivery API, PHP/MySQL, Figma UI (Mar–Apr 2025)
- **QwickLearn LMS** — Firebase, PHP, MySQL, quizzes + progress tracking (Apr–Jun 2024)
- **Vivekananda Techno School Website** — PHP/MySQL institutional site with admin CMS (Feb–Apr 2025)
- **ZetaRise Agency Portal** — CRM, SEO, analytics (Dec 2024–Feb 2025) — https://zetarise.in/
- **T-Phish Security Simulator** — Python/Flask ethical phishing trainer (Aug 2024)
